notes: Live-fetch enrichment continuation for top candidates 11-20.

results.successor_evidence: Cross-referenced search results show: Louis W. Bergman III is the senior RPLS at Cleveland Surveying Co (709 S. Washington Ave, Cleveland TX 77327). Separate but related: 'Humble Surveying Company' at 1032 E First St, Humble TX 77338 is owned by Louis W. Bergman IV — i.e., son. Multi-generational family operation with successor (Bergman IV) running a separate-but-related Humble office. The 'family-surname Bergman IV operating sister firm' = successor in place per skill rule. DEMOTE A→B.
results.team_page_evidence: City of Cleveland TX directory + ResearchGiant + ClevelandTexasChamber listings confirm Louis W. Bergman III at Cleveland Surveying. Spokeo + Manta confirm Louis W. Bergman IV at Humble Surveying Company (separate office, same family). Bergman Engineering also in Cleveland TX 77327 per Manta — third Bergman business cluster.
coasting_tells: Solo senior RPLS Louis W. Bergman III for 47+ years (RPLS granted 1979) at the Cleveland office.
Limited public website presence — referral-driven low-marketing posture.
Liberty County rural location — energy-corridor adjacent (East TX timber/oil) but moderate transactional volume.
results.demote_reason: Family-surname successor (Bergman IV) operating sister-firm in Humble — internal-succession candidate; not a coasting-solo-to-outside-buyer profile.

data_sources.source: Spokeo / cross-ref Bergman IV in Humble Surveying

results.exclusion_reason: Modern tech-forward drone-survey startup (verified aerial data, grading insights, earthwork quantities). Owner Larry Hada presumably brought his RPLS to a new venture — the 47yr RPLS tenure does NOT reflect the firm's tenure. Drop from A consideration: this is a recent tech-startup using drone surveys, not a coasting solo-owner of a long-tenured firm.
results.team_page_evidence: civilmesh.com — 'Civil Mesh Pro combines cutting-edge technology with deep technical expertise to help construction companies, homebuilders, and land developers improve accuracy, reduce costs, and operate more efficiently.' Verified aerial data + grading + earthwork quantities = drone-survey-primary modern startup, NOT a traditional surveying firm.

distress_signals_historical: 1989 court judgment from Texas Commerce Bank-Conroe against Del-Phi Engineering Associates, Inc. and Ernest W. DeLuca + Linda V. DeLuca (771 S.W.2d 589). Historical (37 years old) — likely satisfied long ago, but flag for the manual verification queue.
results.exclusion_reason: Ernest William DeLuca (RPLS granted 1980, 46yr tenure) — historical lien but likely satisfied. No active website found, no team page. Sub-Houston/Conroe market. Cap at C until live operation can be verified.
results.team_page_evidence: CorporationWiki shows Ernest Deluca as President of Del-Phi Engineering Associates Inc. Wife Linda V. DeLuca as Treasurer. Company incorporated 43 years ago (1983). No public website found. 1989 court judgment historical (likely satisfied).
results.comptroller_status: verification_needed - 1989 judgment historical, current status unknown

results.successor_evidence: Live-fetch of sandereng.com/about/our-team/ (2026-05-16) reveals 6 named professionals: Dennis W. Sander (P.E. + RPLS #3535, founder/president), Erik D. Miller (P.E., VP/Partner since 2016), William 'Bill' T. Manning Jr. (P.E., VP/Partner since 2016), Rene G. Hurtado (P.E.), Daniel Benavidez (Graduate Engineer), Juan J. Arreola (Graduate Engineer). However: Dennis Sander is the SOLE RPLS — the firm's surveying capacity is single-RPLS-dependent. The 2 P.E. partners (Miller, Manning) are engineering succession but not surveying succession. Mixed result: engineering side has successor, surveying side does not — but firm is engineering-primary (5 P.E., 1 RPLS).
results.team_page_evidence: sandereng.com/about/our-team/ live-fetch: Dennis W Sander founder, P.E. (Texas #30647) + R.P.L.S. (#3535), '50+ years of engineering experience in civil and municipal projects'. 2 P.E. partners since 2016 (Miller, Manning). 4 P.E.s + 2 graduate engineers + Sander = 7 professionals total. Engineering primary discipline; surveying ancillary.
results.demote_reason: Firm is engineering-primary multi-discipline (5 P.E. + 1 RPLS); the surveying acquisition thesis doesn't fit cleanly. The 2 VP/Partners (Miller, Manning) represent engineering-side succession even if surveying side is single-RPLS. ETA buyers targeting recurring-B2B surveying typically don't acquire engineering-primary firms.

results.successor_evidence: Live-fetched search of stsurvey.com About-us page: 'The company was established in 1980 by Fred W. Lawton, RPLS & PE, and his son, Fred F. Lawton, RPLS.' Fred W Lawton (founder, President) + Fred F Lawton III (VP, RPLS) = explicit family-successor team. Robust drone fleet mentioned. DEMOTE A→B.
results.team_page_evidence: stsurvey.com/About-us (live-fetch summary): 'family-owned company, has been a cornerstone in commercial land surveying and residential surveys since 1980'; founder Fred W Lawton RPLS+PE + son Fred F Lawton III RPLS. 40+ years. Multi-service: ALTA/NSPS, category 1A condition II, topographic, construction, platting, elevation certs. 'Robust drone fleet' for aerial survey + 3D point clouds = MODERN tech-stack.
results.demote_reason: Explicit son-as-RPLS successor (Fred F Lawton III) — internal-succession candidate per verifying-no-successor.md family-surname rule.
coasting_tells: Note: this firm has MODERNIZED (drone fleet, 3D point clouds) — opposite of coasting, but still son-successor in place.

results.successor_evidence: Pepe Engineering is a 60+yr multi-discipline engineering firm with 'Registered Professional Engineers, Land Surveyors, engineers in training and experienced designers and drafters.' Salim Joubran is a 'Principal and 42-year company veteran' — clearly multi-principal firm. The firm is TX-DOT pre-certified Sequence #76 (significant institutional presence). DEMOTE A→B: engineering-primary multi-principal firm with TxDOT credentials = not a coasting-solo profile.
results.team_page_evidence: pepe-engineering.com (search summary): '60 years' multi-discipline RPE+RPLS firm; TX-DOT pre-certified; Salim Joubran is Principal (42yr veteran). Multi-principal firm at 800 Town & Country Blvd Houston 77024.
results.demote_reason: Multi-principal engineering-primary firm with TxDOT pre-certification — substantial operation with internal RPE+RPLS succession; not a solo-coasting profile.

results.successor_evidence: John Rodriquez P.E.+RPLS, CEO since 1982. Solo principal per LinkedIn + RocketReach. Multi-service: civil construction management/inspection, boundary surveying, topographic and construction surveying. Long-tenured (44yr). No public successor identified.
results.team_page_evidence: RocketReach + LinkedIn: John Rodriquez P.E., R.P.L.S., C.E.O at ESOR Consulting Engineers Inc since 1982. Located 6027 Dover House Way, Spring TX 77389. Civil construction management/inspection + surveying services.
coasting_tells: Solo principal John Rodriquez for 44 years (CEO since 1982) — no second principal identified.
Owner age est ~76 (RPLS granted 1980 + 30 + 16 = ~76) — natural exit window.
Multi-service (engineering inspection + surveying) but engineering-primary; sub-A for pure surveying acquisition thesis.

results.exclusion_reason: Firm established 2002 (24yr in business; RPLS tenure of 46yr DOES NOT reflect firm tenure — Gutierrez brought his RPLS to a newer venture). Engineering-primary firm specializing in Water Resources/Transportation/GIS with FEMA/USACE federal contracts. Not a coasting-solo surveying profile.

results.demote_reason: Firm tenure (24yr) much shorter than RPLS tenure proxy implies; engineering-primary federal-contracting firm — wrong profile for surveying-acquisition thesis.

results.successor_evidence: Israel Trevino Gonzalez is the named principal (P.E. + RPLS). Firm est 1977 — 49yr. Multi-discipline civil engineering + surveying. HUB/MBE/DBE certified (TX HUB, City of Austin MBE, Texas UCP DBE). No public RPLS successor identified.
results.team_page_evidence: itgonzalezengineers.com (summary): Established 1977, Austin TX (3501 Manor Rd 78723); registered as TX Engineering Firm F-3216 + TX Licensed Surveying Firm 100573-0. Multi-service: civil engineering (site dev, drainage, water/wastewater, paving) + surveying (boundary, topo, route, platting, aerial, construction staking, GPS). HUB/MBE/DBE certs.

Owner age est ~76 (RPLS 1980 + 30 + 16 = ~76) — natural exit window.
Multi-discipline firm but old website (no copyright year visible from search).
Austin Travis County major-metro location + HUB/MBE/DBE certs = recurring municipal contract eligibility = strong recurring-B2B underwriting.
